ItacAcademyItem.Name: Accordati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The dates of this Academy are not clear; possibly, the Academy was first called degli Accordati, and later degli Uniti, but it was independent from the other Accademia degli Uniti, which was created some 40 years later.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
